title: astrolepis integerrima
intro: Astrolepis integerrima, also known as the smooth lipfern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. It is native to Central and South America, where it grows in shaded, humid environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The smooth lipfern can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function.
